_comment: Copy to config.json and fill in ntfyTopic. rcon password auto-reads from dedicated.cfg if left blank. Only ntfyTopic is required.
_notifyIssues: Red alert when the status poll can't reach the server (edge-triggered, after 3 straight failures) + a green one on recovery. GF-Watchdog alerts on health too, so a real outage buzzes once from each - set false to leave that to the watchdog alone.
